tool.name: OGS: PVD2XDMF
tool.description: Galaxy wrapper for the OGS utility 'PVD2XDMF'.
tool.command: #for $item in $pvd_file_pvd_data ln -sf '$item' '$item.element_identifier'; #end for ln -sf '$pvd_file' '$pvd_file.element_identifier'; PVD2XDMF --output-directory output_1.vtu '$pvd_file.element_identifier'
tool.help: This tool runs the **PVD2XDMF** utility from the OpenGeoSys suite.
